svg.title: Super admin configuration flow for AIR data and cutoffs
svg.desc: Shows what super admin controls, when they update it, and how it flows into student-facing calculations

g.text: Super admin panel — annual update cycle

svg.text: Trigger: after NTA publishes official result + counselling cutoff data each year

g.text: Applies formulas 1–6 from above using latest admin config values
"Based on [year] NTA data. Actual may vary."

svg.text: PM critique: never let student dashboard go stale silently — show a banner if admin config is >365 days old.
